zh.lifeSummary: 當Avis Streame於1585年出生在英國英格蘭巴金哈姆爾艾勒斯波洛時，她的父親Rycharde Streame25歲，母親Mary Magdeline Sirett Claudy25歲。她於大約1600年與Thomas Tibballs在英國薩默塞特韋斯特 巴波洛結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1622年11月19日在她的家鄉享年37歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭巴金哈姆爾艾勒斯波洛。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Avis Streame于1585年出生在英国英格兰巴金哈姆爾艾勒斯波洛时，她的父亲Rycharde Streame25岁，母亲Mary Magdeline Sirett Claudy25岁。她于大约1600年与Thomas Tibballs在英国薩默塞特韋斯特 巴波洛结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1622年11月19日在她的家乡享年37岁，埋葬在英国英格兰巴金哈姆爾艾勒斯波洛。

nameMeanings.name: Streame
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from Middle English stre(a)m(e) ‘stream’ (Old English strēam). The surname may be topographic, for someone who lived beside a stream, or habitational, from a place so named, such as Stream in Williton (Somerset).
Americanized form (translation into English) of Swedish Ström and Norwegian Strøm (see Strom ).

variants.name: Strom
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Scandinavian Erik, Lars, Nils, Sven, Alvar, Anders, Aslaug, Astrid, Helmer, Jarl, Knut, Sigfrid.
Swedish (Ström) and Danish (Strøm): from ström, strøm ‘current’, a topographic name for someone who lived by a river or a stream, or an ornamental name. Compare Stream 2, Strome , and Strum .
Norwegian (Strøm): habitational name from any of numerous farmsteads so named from Old Norse straumr ‘current, stream’. Compare 1 above.

nameMeanings.name: Avis
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Norman French form of the ancient Germanic name Aveza, derived from a short form of one or more compound names containing the first element av (as in Ava ; the meaning is uncertain). The correspondence in form to the Latin word avis ‘bird’ is coincidental.

variants.name: Avice
meanings: From a Norman French form of the ancient Germanic name Aveza, derived from a short form of one or more compound names containing the first element av (as in Ava ; the meaning is uncertain). The correspondence in form to the Latin word avis ‘bird’ is coincidental.

en.lifeSummary: When Avis Streame was born in 1585, in Ellesborough, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Rycharde Streame, was 25 and her mother, Mary Magdeline Sirett Claudy, was 25. She married Thomas Tibballs about 1600, in West Bagborough, Somerset, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 3 daughters. She died on 19 November 1622, in her hometown, at the age of 37, and was buried in Ellesborough, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Avis Streame est née en 1585, à Ellesborough, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Rycharde Streame, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Mary Magdeline Sirett Claudy, avait 25 ans. Elle a épousé Thomas Tibballs environ 1600, à West Bagborough, Somerset, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée le 19 novembre 1622, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 37 ans, et a été enterrée à Ellesborough, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Avis Streame 1585 in Ellesborough, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Rycharde Streame 25 und ihre Mutter Mary Magdeline Sirett Claudy 25. Sie hat um 1600 in West Bagborough, Somerset, England Thomas Tibballs geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb am 19. November 1622 im Alter von 37 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort und wurde in Ellesborough, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Avis Streame è nata il nel 1585 nel Ellesborough, Buckinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Rycharde Streame, aveva 25 anni e sua madre, Mary Magdeline Sirett Claudy, aveva 25 anni. Lei sposato Thomas Tibballs circa 1600, nel West Bagborough, Somerset, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 19 novembre 1622, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 37 anni, e fu sepolta a Ellesborough, Buckinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Avis Streameが1585年にイギリスイギリスブクインガムシュアイアエレスボロウで生まれた時，父Rycharde Streameは25歳，母Mary Magdeline Sirett Claudyは25歳であった。約1600年にイギリスソメルセトウエスト バグボロウでThomas Tibballsと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1622年11月19日に故郷で37歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスブクインガムシュアイアエレスボロウにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Avis Streame(이)가 1585년 영국 잉글랜드 벅잉함실르 엘레스버루그h에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Rycharde Streame(은)는 25세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mary Magdeline Sirett Claudy(은)는 25세였다. 그녀는 대략 1600년 영국 서머세트 웨스트 바그버루그h에서 Thomas Tibballs(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1622년 11월 19일 그녀의 고향에서 37세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 벅잉함실르 엘레스버루그h에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Avis Streame nasceu em 1585, em Ellesborough, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Rycharde Streame, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Mary Magdeline Sirett Claudy, tinha 25 anos. Ela casou-se com Thomas Tibballs aproximadamente 1600, em West Bagborough, Somerset, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 19 de novembro de 1622, em sua cidade natal, com 37 anos, e foi sepultada em Ellesborough, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Avis Streame родилась в 1585 г. в местности эллесбороую, буккингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Rycharde Streame было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Mary Magdeline Sirett Claudy, 25. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas Tibballs около 1600 г. в местности вест багбороую, сомирсет, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла 19 ноября 1622 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 37 лет и была похоронена в местности эллесбороую, буккингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Avis Streame nació en 1585, en Ellesborough, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Rycharde Streame, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Mary Magdeline Sirett Claudy, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Thomas Tibballs aproximadamente 1600, en West Bagborough, Somerset, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 19 de noviembre de 1622, en su pueblo, a la edad de 37 años, y fue sepultada en Ellesborough, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
